subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call to discuss potential synergies between our product roadmaps.

We have the following slots available next week for a 2-hour meeting:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, or suggest an alternative if none of these fit.

Regarding your request for internal contact information: our company policy prohibits sharing internal contact details with external parties. For all official inquiries, please refer to our public website at https://company.internal/contact where you can find the appropriate channels to reach our team members.

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Company Team
